data.title: IN XI'AN partners with ChaHalo to bring Xi'an culture to NY, promoting tea aroma. Cross-cultural feast in NA.
data.description: In a unique cross-cultural event, the ancient tea aroma from Xi'an in China intersected with the lively energy of New York City, creating a shared journey. This event took place on Jan. 29, 2026, highlighting the rich cultural exchange unfolding in North America. The fusion of these two cities brought forth a culinary experience where traditions melded, resulting in a vibrant and diverse feast. This encounter symbolized the blend of histories and flavors, demonstrating the global connection between Xi'an and New York City.

data.title: Griff Green plans to use unclaimed Ethereum from The DAO hack for new security initiative; focus on distribution methods.
data.description: Griff Green stated that although The DAO has a skilled team capable of developing security projects independently, they prioritize devising methods for security distribution.

data.title: Sharon AI to deploy 1K B200 cluster at NEXTDC M3 Data Center in Melbourne, Australia using Lenovo and VAST Data.
data.description: SharonAI Holdings Inc. and its subsidiaries have revealed plans to deploy a 1K B200 cluster at NEXTDC’s Tier IV M3 Data Center in Melbourne, Australia. This move marks a significant collaboration between the companies, including Sharon AI, Lenovo, and VAST Data. The deployment is aimed at delivering advanced accelerated computing infrastructure in the region. NEXTDC's Chief Commercial and Customer Officer, David Dzienciol, expressed enthusiasm about expanding the partnership with Sharon AI and the other involved entities.

data.title: Optimism boosts OP token with buyback plan: half Superchain revenue to repurchase tokens, holding for ecosystem growth. Starting next month.
data.description: Starting next month, the Optimism blockchain will initiate the sale of 50% of its Superchain revenue to repurchase its own token. The repurchased tokens will be retained for potential future use within the ecosystem.

data.title: World's longest saree (4+ km) unveiled in Mumbai by Red Dot Foundation to fight Marital Rape Exception in India.
data.description: In Mumbai, India, the Red Dot Foundation launched a significant campaign unveiling the world's longest saree, measuring over four kilometers in length. This initiative aims to raise awareness and combat the issue of Marital Rape Exception prevalent in India.

data.title: Trump to announce new Fed chair Friday, with Kevin Warsh emerging as frontrunner. Other possible picks include Kevin Hassett, Rick Rieder, and Christopher Waller.
data.description: At the premiere of the film "Melania," President Donald Trump revealed that he will unveil his choice for the Federal Reserve Chair the following day. He mentioned having a specific individual in consideration and highlighted a shortlist that comprises notable figures including Kevin Warsh, Kevin Hassett, Rick Rieder, and Christopher Waller. Kevin Warsh has been identified as the leading contender for the position as per reports. Trump's announcement is anticipated to occur the next morning, as stated during his remarks at the event. For additional details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Unitree Robotics ranks no.1 globally in humanoid robot shipments, surpassing 5,500 units in 2025 amidst misinformation.
data.description: In Hangzhou, China, Unitree Robotics, a prominent company in general-purpose robotics development, released an official statement on January 22, 2026, addressing inaccuracies surrounding its 2025 sales and shipment data. This announcement aimed to correct misinformation spread online.

data.title: Government shutdown odds fall on betting platforms after Trump announces bipartisan deal. Odds dropped from 72% to 59%. $27 million bet on outcome.
data.description: Bets on a federal government shutdown decreased significantly after President Donald Trump announced a bipartisan agreement on Saturday. Cryptocurrency punters on Polymarket shifted the odds from 72% to 59% following the news. Over $27 million has been wagered on this outcome, making it one of the most active bets on the platform. The market will be deemed "Yes" if the Office of Personnel Management confirms a shutdown by Jan. 31 due to a funding gap. Polymarket, which operates on Polygon (CRYPTO: POL), allows users to place bets using the USDC stablecoin. Additionally, Kalshi users also predicted a 59% likelihood of a shutdown. (Characters: 597)
